title: The Upward Spiral of Increased Green IT Impact
description: A flowchart illustrating the positive feedback loop created by implementing Green IT practices, showing how initial actions lead to increased benefits across environmental, economic, and efficiency domains.
elements: Green IT Initiatives (e.g., Server Virtualization, Energy-Efficient Hardware)
Direct Outcomes (Reduced Energy Consumption, Lower E-Waste)
Secondary Benefits (Cost Savings, Improved Brand Reputation)
Increased Investment & Innovation in Green IT
relationships: Green IT Initiatives lead to Direct Outcomes, which create Secondary Benefits. These benefits incentivize and fund Increased Investment & Innovation, which in turn leads to more advanced Green IT Initiatives, creating a reinforcing cycle.
